features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need to manage your links
features.subtitle: Powerful features designed for individuals, teams, and enterprises

customLinks.title: Custom Short Links
customLinks.description: Create branded short links with custom aliases. Set expiry dates, password protection, and domain control for full ownership.

analytics.title: Real-Time Analytics
analytics.description: Detailed click analytics with geo breakdown, device types, and referrer tracking - everything you need to understand your audience.

security.title: Access Control
security.description: Password-protect any link or page. Set expiration dates and control exactly who can access your content.

qrGenerator.title: Dynamic QR Codes
qrGenerator.description: Generate dynamic QR codes you can update without reprinting. Track every scan with built-in analytics.

blockPages.title: Block Landing Pages
blockPages.description: Build micro landing pages with drag-and-drop blocks. Add social links, images, buttons, and custom bio content in minutes.

gdpr.title: GDPR Compliant
gdpr.description: Your data and your users' data are handled in full compliance with EU GDPR regulations - privacy by design, no exceptions.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From long URL to powerful branded link in three simple steps

step1.title: Create your link
step1.description: Paste your long URL and instantly get a customizable short link with a custom alias and your own domain.

step2.title: Share everywhere
step2.description: Use your short link, QR code, or landing page - across social media, email campaigns, print materials, and offline.

step3.title: Analyze and optimize
step3.description: Track clicks, traffic sources, and geographic data. Fine-tune your campaigns with real, actionable insights.

useCases.title: Built for every use case
useCases.subtitle: From freelancers to enterprises - MagLink adapts to your needs

marketing.title: Trackable campaigns
marketing.description: Create UTM-tagged links, measure conversions, and optimize your ad spend with precise, real-time data.

creators.title: The ultimate link in bio
creators.description: A landing page with all your links and content. Update it in real time - without changing your QR code.

enterprise.title: Full white-label
enterprise.description: Customize the platform with your own logo, branded consent pages, and advanced team management.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Loved by thousands of users
testimonials.subtitle: See what our customers say about MagLink

t1.quote: MagLink completely changed how we manage our campaigns. The analytics are incredibly detailed and the custom domains give us a professional edge.
t1.name: Sara Marchetti

t2.quote: I use it for my link in bio and QR codes for events. Super simple, beautiful result. My audience loves how clean everything looks.
t2.name: Luca Colombo

t3.quote: The white-label features are exactly what our agency needed. We can now offer branded link management as part of our service package.
t3.name: Alessia Greco

cta.title: Ready to take control
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of businesses and creators who use MagLink to turn links into powerful marketing tools.
cta.noCreditCard: No credit card required. Free plan available forever.

footer.tagline: The all-in-one link management platform for businesses and creators.

cookieBanner.title: We use cookies
cookieBanner.description: We use essential cookies to make our site work. With your consent, we may also use analytics and marketing cookies to improve your experience and show relevant content.

preferences.title: Cookie preferences
preferences.description: Choose which cookies you allow us to use. You can change your mind at any time.

necessary.title: Essential cookies
necessary.description: Required for the site to function. Includes session management, CSRF protection, and language preferences. These cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Analytics cookies
analytics.description: Help us understand how visitors interact with the site by collecting anonymous usage data. Used to improve performance and content.

marketing.title: Marketing cookies
marketing.description: Used to show relevant ads and measure the effectiveness of advertising campaigns. No data is shared with third parties without your consent.
